title: chlorophora excelsa
intro: Chlorophora excelsa, also known as the iroko or African teak, is a tropical tree species native to West Africa. The medicinal properties of Chlorophora excelsa lie in its bark, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and malaria. The health benefits associated with Chlorophora excelsa include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. Chlorophora excelsa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to leverage its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
